Why ScanGuru

Why healthcare teams choose ScanGuru

Everything that matters for a pilot, in one glance.

Multi-modal platform — 50+ pathologies live across 5 modalities, 13+ trained models
Explainable AI with attention heatmaps on every study
Dual-language reports in 83 languages — native language alongside English
Research collaboration program for universities and labs
“Heal for All” free access for verified low-income-country clinics
Human-reviewed, clinician-in-the-loop workflows
Built around HIPAA & GDPR principles
Integrates over DICOM/PACS and a REST API
How It Works

From scan to signed report in four steps

ScanGuru drops into your existing workflow — upload directly or integrate over your PACS, and every study comes back as an explainable, dual-language report for clinician sign-off.

1
🔗

Connect

Upload through the web app, or integrate over DICOM/PACS and the REST API at api.scanguru.net.

→
2
🧠

AI analysis

Heterogeneous model ensembles analyze the study across 13+ trained modalities, with explainable attention heatmaps.

→
3
📄

Dual-language report

A structured PDF in any of 83 languages — clinical, comprehensive, and patient variants, native language alongside English.

→
4
🩺

Clinician review

Results support a qualified clinician’s read, confirmed before any decision.

→
5
🔒

Secure handling

Encrypted in transit and at rest, with PHI-aware logging and role-based access. Data location and retention are agreed with each pilot partner.

Research Collaborations

Seeking pilot partners worldwide

ScanGuru is in its pilot phase and actively partnering with universities, clinics, and healthcare systems to evaluate multilingual, explainable imaging AI in real-world research settings.

🎓

Universities & research labs

Free research access, multilingual reporting, and publication collaboration for academic radiology and AI groups.

🏥

Clinics & hospitals

Evaluation pilots for decision support across chest, CT, MSK, and dental imaging — clinician-reviewed and research use only.

🌍

Equity & access programs

Our Heal for All program offers free access for verified low-income-country clinics and charity hospitals.

Become a pilot partner
Built for Emerging Markets

From academic hospitals to regional clinics

ScanGuru is designed for healthcare systems across the spectrum — major academic centers and regional clinics in emerging markets alike. It is where our multilingual, accessible approach matters most.

🌍

Reports in the patient’s language

Dual-language PDF reports in 83 languages — the patient’s language alongside English — so findings travel across borders and care teams.

☁️

Light on infrastructure

Cloud-based and integrated over standard DICOM/PACS and a REST API — no heavy on-site build required to start a pilot.

🔬

Research-friendly

Free research access and publication collaboration for academic and clinic partners, aligned to our India, Southeast Asia, and Middle East & Africa focus.

Comprehensive Coverage

One Platform, Every Modality

While competitors focus on 2-3 modalities, ScanGuru delivers comprehensive AI analysis across your entire imaging department.

Available today

🫁

Chest X-Ray

50 Pathologies

Comprehensive CXR analysis from pneumonia to pulmonary nodules. 5-model hybrid ensemble with 8-zone anatomical analysis and automated triage.

Pneumonia Cardiomegaly Pneumothorax Nodules
Scoring: Fleischner, CO-RADS, CTR Learn More →
🧠

CT Brain

12 Pathologies

Emergency neuro imaging with hemorrhage classification, stroke detection, midline shift analysis, and trauma assessment.

Hemorrhage Stroke Trauma Mass Effect
Scoring: Marshall Classification Learn More →
🫁

CT Chest

30+ Pathologies

Enterprise-grade thoracic CT with lung nodule analysis, PE detection, COVID-RADS scoring, and ILD pattern recognition.

Lung Nodules PE COVID-19 ILD
Scoring: Lung-RADS, Wells Score Learn More →
🦷

Dental X-Ray

25+ Pathologies

Cavity detection, root canal assessment, bone loss quantification, and impaction analysis. OPG and CBCT supported.

Cavities Periapical Bone Loss Impactions
Format: OPG, Periapical, CBCT Learn More →
🦴

MSK X-Ray

40+ Pathologies

Fracture detection, alignment assessment, and degenerative change identification across 8 anatomical regions.

Fractures Dislocations Arthritis Bone Lesions
Scoring: Garden, Weber, K-L Learn More →
🩺

Mammography

42 Pathologies

AI-enhanced breast cancer screening with automated BI-RADS 0-6 classification, ACR density assessment, and CAD overlays.

Masses Calcifications Asymmetries Distortion
Scoring: BI-RADS 0-6, ACR A-D Learn More →

On the roadmap

🧲

MRI (6 Types)

200+ Pathologies

Brain, Spine, Knee, Cardiac, Shoulder, Prostate - comprehensive multi-sequence analysis with all major protocols supported.

Scoring: PI-RADS, K-L, Multiple Learn More →
📡

Ultrasound

35+ Pathologies

Multi-organ analysis including obstetric, abdominal, breast, and thyroid imaging with real-time support.

☢️

PET & PET-CT

35 Pathologies

Metabolic activity mapping, SUV quantification, Deauville scoring, and comprehensive oncological assessment.

Oncology Neurology Cardiology SUV Analysis
Scoring: Deauville, PERCIST Learn More →
See the Output

Real reports, built for three audiences

Every analysis produces a structured, explainable PDF — a crisp clinical read for radiologists, a detailed comprehensive report for research and triage, and a plain-language summary for patients. These are real sample reports.

🫁

Chest X-ray

📄 Clinical report
2 pages · radiologist
📄 Comprehensive report
5 pages · research & triage
📄 Patient report
2 pages · plain-language
🧠

CT Brain

📄 Clinical report
2 pages · radiologist
📄 Comprehensive report
5 pages · research & triage
📄 Patient report
1 page · plain-language
🩻

CT Chest

📄 Clinical report
2 pages · radiologist
📄 Comprehensive report
5 pages · research & triage
📄 Patient report
1 page · plain-language

For Academia

Why universities choose ScanGuru

Built to support research and teaching in medical imaging AI — with multilingual reach most platforms can't match.

Free for research

No-cost access for verified academic research and teaching use.

Multilingual reporting

Dual-language PDF reports across 83 languages — for international cohorts and global collaborators.

Explainable AI

Grad-CAM and attention overlays show what the model focused on — not a black box.

API access

Programmatic access for batch analysis and integration into research pipelines.

Publication collaboration

Open to co-authorship and joint evaluation studies with academic partners.

Research use only

Clear regulatory positioning with clinician review — appropriate for evaluation and study settings.

Partner with us
Why ScanGuru

Comprehensive vs. Point Solutions

See how a unified platform compares to managing multiple specialized vendors.

ScanGuru Platform

Comprehensive Solution

  • ✓ 5 live modalities in one unified platform (17 on the roadmap)
  • ✓ 50+ pathologies live across 5 modalities
  • ✓ Single integration, one vendor relationship
  • ✓ Unified dashboard for all modalities
  • ✓ 45+ languages with RTL support
  • ✓ 15+ clinical scoring systems integrated
Typical Approach

Point Solutions

  • − 1-3 specialized modalities per vendor
  • − 20-50 pathologies per solution
  • − Multiple integrations, vendor contracts
  • − Separate dashboards for each solution
  • − English + limited language support
  • − Variable scoring system support

A unified platform means simpler integration, consistent user experience, lower total cost of ownership, and comprehensive coverage without managing multiple vendor relationships.

Advanced Technology

Proprietary Ensemble AI Architecture

Sophisticated deep learning models optimized for clinical accuracy and validated on 750,000+ medical images.

🧠

Multi-Model Ensemble

Multiple specialized neural networks working together for higher accuracy than single-model approaches.

✅

Clinically Validated

Trained and validated on 750,000+ medical images across diverse patient populations and scanner types.

📋

Clinical Heuristics

AI findings enhanced with clinical rules and scoring systems used by practicing radiologists.

🔍

Explainable AI

Grad-CAM heatmaps and confidence scores provide transparency into AI reasoning and findings.

Heal for All

Free for the clinics the world overlooks.

ScanGuru is free — for life — for verified low-income-country institutions, rural clinics, and children's and elderly cancer hospitals. Funders can sponsor a clinic and receive honest, usage-backed impact reports.

Decision support, with a clinician in the loop. ScanGuru is built to support a qualified clinician’s judgment — not replace it. Market-specific regulatory registration in progress — currently available for research and evaluation.
Designed for use within validated modalities, under clinical supervision.
